summary: Mobile-first UI testing for The Doggy Company Pet Life OS - Iteration 181. All critical fixes verified: MobileMenu X close button works, 3-col pillar grid displays 13 pillars, no glass orb in header, no duplicate headers on pillar pages, Soul Growth Card gamification on onboarding, UniversalServiceButton hidden on /pet-home. Backend API /api/pets/my-pets returns pets with doggy_soul_answers field populated.

details: Opens via hamburger (top-left ☰) on /pet-home
X close button visible (data-testid='mobile-menu-close-btn')
3-column pillar grid with 13 pillars
'Ask Mira anything' button visible
Portal renders via createPortal to document.body (z-index 99999/100000)
No glass orb in header (removed as per requirements)
Closes correctly when X button clicked
Single Navbar at top (1 hamburger button)
No duplicate headers
No tab bar (Pet Home/Dashboard/My Pets removed)
Bottom MobileNavBar visible with Mira orb
Pet selector visible (Mojo 100%, Mystique 94%)
Pet hero card with soul score
Soul chapter pills visible
Only 1 hamburger button on each page
No duplicate 'The Doggy Company®' header
No second hamburger on the right side
Navbar from MainLayout handles mobile navigation
Soul Growth Card shows dark card with glowing SVG ring
'0 SOUL PTS' centered text visible
Mira quote visible ('Every soul has a story...')
Step progress bar with chapter name (Identity)
Skip button NOT visible on step 0 (de-emphasized)
SVG circles found for ring animation
Hidden on /pet-home (confirmed)
Hidden on /my-requests, /my-pets, /dashboard pages
/api/pets/my-pets returns pets with doggy_soul_answers field populated
Mojo: doggy_soul_answers keys include describe_3_words, general_nature, stranger_reaction
Mystique: doggy_soul_answers keys include name, breed, gender, weight, energy_level
Bruno: doggy_soul_answers keys include food_allergies, diet_type, favorite_treats
Login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 works
Redirects to /pet-home correctly

critical_code_review_comments: MobileMenu.jsx correctly uses createPortal to document.body with z-index 99999/100000
X close button has proper data-testid='mobile-menu-close-btn' for testing
PillarPageLayout.jsx removed duplicate mobile header with hamburger and MobileMenu
PetSoulOnboarding.jsx SoulGrowthCard component has SVG ring with glow animation
Skip button only visible after step 1 (currentStep > 0)
ConditionalFloatingButton in App.js correctly hides on /pet-home, /my-requests, /my-pets, /dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile navigation fixes verified. MobileMenu opens from left via portal with z-index 99999/100000, has X close button (data-testid='mobile-menu-close-btn'), 3-col pillar grid with 13 pillars, no glass orb in header. Pillar pages have no duplicate headers or hamburgers. Onboarding Soul Growth Card shows dark card with glowing SVG ring, '0 SOUL PTS', Mira quote, step progress bar. Skip button de-emphasized (only visible after step 1). UniversalServiceButton hidden on /pet-home, /my-requests, /my-pets, /dashboard. Backend API /api/pets/my-pets returns pets with doggy_soul_answers field populated.
